Metadata.title: Wuzzify — AI Employees
Metadata.description: Replace 5 employees with one AI agent. Wuzzify agents run sales, support, marketing, and document processing around the clock.

Hero.body: Wuzzify agents handle sales, support, marketing, and document processing around the clock, faster than a full team — at a quarter of the cost. No vacations, no training, no waiting.

demo.bubble1User: Hi, I'm looking for a plan for 50 people on my team. How much would that cost per month?
demo.bubble2AgentPre: Hi there. The Business plan for 50 users starts at
demo.bubble2AgentPost: SAR/month and includes 3 agents. Would you like a custom proposal that includes integration with your stack?
demo.bubble3User: Yes, we use Salesforce. Is that integration supported?
demo.bubble4Agent: Yes. I'll send you a proposal in minutes with the integration links.

AgentsGrid.body: Every agent is trained for a specific role — no generic templates, no vague replies. Deploy only the team you need.
AgentsGrid.salesTitle: Our sales agent closes deals while you sleep.
AgentsGrid.salesBody: Identifies prospects, answers their questions, and sends tailored offers straight from your CRM.
AgentsGrid.salesChip2: Modern Standard Arabic and Gulf dialects
AgentsGrid.supportBody: 2,341 conversations. One agent. Last Tuesday. 94% resolved with no human in the loop.
AgentsGrid.seoBody: Researches keywords, writes the content, and tunes the meta — weekly, automatically.
AgentsGrid.marketingBody: Designs, writes, and schedules — for Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Weekly reports on autopilot.
AgentsGrid.ocrBody: Invoices, contracts, IDs, cheques — extracted and classified at 99% accuracy, in Arabic and English.

HowItWorks.step1Body: Five ready-made templates: sales, support, SEO, marketing, or documents. Pick one and go.
HowItWorks.step2Body: Upload documents or connect your systems. The agent learns your company's voice in 10 minutes.
HowItWorks.step3Body: Works on WhatsApp, email, your website, or your internal system. You just monitor.

Pricing.subtitle: 7-day free trial. No card. Cancel anytime.
Pricing.proDesc: For mature teams that need a complete smart team.
Pricing.entDesc: For large companies with high usage.

FAQ.title: Everything you want to know. Briefly.
FAQ.q1: Do Wuzzify agents understand different Arabic dialects?
FAQ.a1: Yes. The agents are trained on Modern Standard Arabic and Gulf, Egyptian, and Levantine dialects. You can also upload examples from your previous conversations to fine-tune the dialect for your audience.
FAQ.q2: How long does it take to get my agent running?
FAQ.a2: Ten minutes on average. Pick a template, connect your data sources, and let auto-training do the rest.
FAQ.a3: In data centers inside Saudi Arabia, compliant with the Saudi Data & AI Authority (SDAIA) requirements. Full encryption in transit and at rest.
FAQ.q4: Can I connect the agent to my existing systems?
FAQ.a4: Yes. Ready-made integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Zendesk, Intercom, WhatsApp Business, Gmail, and 50+ other tools. Plus an open API for any custom connection.
FAQ.q5: What if the agent isn't a fit?
FAQ.a5: Cancel anytime, no questions. The 7-day free trial requires no credit card.

CTABanner.title: Your smart team. Ready in 10 minutes.
CTABanner.body: No credit card. No commitments. Just try it and decide.
CTABanner.footnote: 7 full days · Cancel with one click
CTABanner.success: Your details have been sent. We'll be in touch shortly.
CTABanner.errorGeneric: Couldn't send right now. Please try again in a moment.

Footer.tagline: AI employees built for the Arabic market. Based in Riyadh and Cairo.
